intended_use: The Thirona LungQ software provides reproducible CT values for pulmonary tissue which is essential for providing quantitative support for diagnosis and follow up examination. The LungQ software can be
intended_use_full: The Thirona LungQ software provides reproducible CT values for pulmonary tissue which is essential for providing quantitative support for diagnosis and follow up examination. The LungQ software can be used to support physician in the diagnosis and documentation of pulmonary tissues images (e.g., abnormalities) from CT thoracic datasets. Three-D segmentation and isolation of sub-compartments, volumetric analysis, density evaluations, fissure evaluation, and reporting tools are provided.
target_condition: pulmonary abnormalities visible on CT thorax
ground_truth: For lung and lobar volumes/density/fissure: LungQ v1.1.0 (predicate device); for subsegmental volumes and density: expert human segmentation corrections
other_metrics: Fissure completeness Az value: 0.97 (threshold ≥0.95); Lung and lobar volume agreement: ≤10% difference; LAA-950HU density: -1% to 1% agreement limits; LAA-910HU density: -10% to 10% agreement limits; 15th percentile density: -10 HU to 10 HU agreement limits; Subsegmental volume and density: <150mL absolute difference and <5% relative difference versus expert reference
